name: click-sdd
description: Click Seguros SDD workflow plugin for Claude Code.

orchestration_profile.title: Orchestration profile
orchestration_profile.description: Active runtime profile resolved by click-orchestrator before delegation. Built-in default is always available; custom profile artifacts can be activated by name.

orchestrator_model.title: Orchestrator model
orchestrator_model.description: Model alias click-orchestrator resolves at runtime for every Agent delegation (sonnet/opus/haiku/fable/full-id/inherit).

prd_writer_model.title: PRD writer model
prd_writer_model.description: Model alias click-prd-writer resolves at runtime for every Agent delegation (sonnet/opus/haiku/fable/full-id/inherit).

architect_model.title: Architect model
architect_model.description: Model alias click-architect resolves at runtime for every Agent delegation (sonnet/opus/haiku/fable/full-id/inherit).

reviewer_model.title: Reviewer model
reviewer_model.description: Model alias click-reviewer resolves at runtime for every Agent delegation (sonnet/opus/haiku/fable/full-id/inherit).

memory_curator_model.title: Memory curator model
memory_curator_model.description: Model alias click-memory-curator resolves at runtime for every Agent delegation (sonnet/opus/haiku/fable/full-id/inherit).
